default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client strategy sprint progress and resolve blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Writing Guidelines Need an Overhaul:** Use paragraph-length examples instead of single sentences. The current format produces robotic, repetitive AI output, as seen with Anything and Hyper-Exponential.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Client Expectations Vary Widely:** Some clients (e.g., Fleet, Flight source) require intense accuracy and process scrutiny, while others (e.g., Remkus) are highly collaborative. This requires a flexible, client-specific approach.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [**New Service Offerings Defined:** Backlinks are available via outsourcing (\~$150–$200/link) but are de-emphasized due to low ROI. Thought leadership is a separate, high-touch engagement starting at $10–15k.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [**Webflow Table Publishing Solved:** A simple workaround exists: use Claude to convert tables to HTML, then paste the code into Webflow's custom code block. This unblocks several stalled Linear tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

## Topics

### Internal Process & Pipeline Improvements

  - [**Writing Guidelines:**](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [**Problem:** Single-sentence examples in guidelines produce robotic, repetitive AI output.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use paragraph-length examples to provide sufficient context for tone and style.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida created a "Writing like a human" section for Anything's guidelines; this will serve as a template.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [**Agentic Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
      - [**Problem:** The pipeline sometimes hallucinates facts or produces dead links, requiring heavy manual fact-checking (e.g., Hyper-Exponential).](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
      - [**Action:** Andi will investigate specifying a better deep researcher within the pipeline to improve accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
  - [**Webflow Tables:**](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [**Problem:** Publishing articles with tables on Webflow is a known blocker, stalling several Linear tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [**Solution:** Convert tables to HTML using Claude, then paste the code into Webflow's custom code block. Suleiman is already familiar with this process.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

### Client Updates

#### Fleet Device Management

  - [**Strategy Presentation:**](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Client Brock approved the strategic approach but requested an additional content lane for OS updates.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida will research the SEO value of an OS update lane.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**Artifacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Brock requested significant revisions to audience personas and company context.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik has a line-by-line review with Brock tomorrow to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use content to update AI's understanding of Fleet's current offerings, as its knowledge base is \~2 years old.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

#### Flight source

  - [**Feedback:** Client is highly responsive but has specific, challenging requests.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [**Images:** Demands multiple images per article, citing a lack of images as a "clear sign of AI in 2025."](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
          - [**Constraint:** This is not feasible; we can provide one simple image per article max.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Accuracy:** Requires extreme precision, flagging minor details (e.g., "manufacturers" vs. "companies").](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [**Process:** Left feedback for the calibration article in Slack screenshots, complicating review.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [**Action:** Andi will use this client as a demo case for Marcel to refine the agentic pipeline, testing its ability to meet such exacting standards.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

#### Hyper-Exponential

  - [**Pipeline Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** Requires heavy manual fact-checking due to AI hallucinations and dead links.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
      - [**Tone:** Content sounds robotic, likely from the pipeline condensing long drafts (e.g., 4k words → 2k words).](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - [**Staging:**](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2270.0)
      - [**Blocker:** 4 articles are ready for staging, but Suleiman is out today.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will message Suleiman directly to prioritize the Linear ticket upon his return.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2312.0)

#### Anything

  - [**Feedback:** Client Drew's primary concern is tone, not accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Goal:** Write in a plain-spoken style like Stripe or OpenAI.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida is updating the writing guidelines with a "Writing like a human" section and will regenerate the article.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)

#### Bubble

  - [**Expectations:** Client seems to have higher expectations, requesting analytical reports beyond the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**Action:** Erik and Andi will meet with client Didi tomorrow for a mid-sprint check-in to align on expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

#### Logic

  - [**New Service Inquiries:**](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [**Backlinks:** Client asked about backlink services.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
          - [**Response:** We offer it via outsourcing (\~$150–$200/link) but de-emphasize it due to low ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [**Thought Leadership:** Client asked about thought leadership content.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
          - [**Response:** This is a separate, high-touch engagement starting at $10–15k.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [**CMS Access:** Client will provide direct CMS access for self-staging.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

#### Other Client Updates

  - [**u.com:** Strategy presented; client confirmed API prioritization. Keyword research starts Monday (Tamara).](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

  - [**Remkus:** 5 blogs ready for client review. Aida is drafting a Phase 2 executive summary.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [**Lovable:** 8 blogs published. Aida will write custom template descriptions while Atlas pipeline is built.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [**Base 10:** 1 outline sent; awaiting feedback. 3 glossary outlines are ready to send.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [**Relay:** 9 articles published after partner bank approval.](https://fathom.video/share/aCny4g9yh_7GHj8neQ8yu2FsmkenGzkv?tab=summary&timestamp=2332.0)
